query_normalized: can publicly available data reveal subtle violations of time-reversal symmetry in beta decay? physics
rationale: This paper addresses the user's question by providing theoretical calculations and experimental context for neutrinoless double beta decay (0νββ), which is the primary physical mechanism used to search for time-reversal symmetry violations (via CP violation) in beta decay processes.
